ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Set the marker format that defines a new tab in your markdown
ast.target: 设置定义Markdown中新标签页的标记格式

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 示例：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Allows editing tabs by clicking on it.
ast.target: 允许通过点击标签页进行编辑。\n

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Add additional information to Obsidian's cache.
ast.target: 向Obsidian的缓存添加额外信息。\n

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: This allows backlinks, outgoing links, headings, tags showing on the sidebar. Also supports renaming files, tags.
ast.target: 这允许反向链接、出站链接、标题、标签显示在侧边栏。还支持重命名文件、标签。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: It should also allow other plugins that uses the cache like Dataview
ast.target: 这也应该允许其他使用缓存的插件，如Dataview。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: This is rebuilds the cache if you encounter syncing issues.
ast.target: 如果遇到同步问题，这会重建缓存。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Reload the app to apply changes
ast.target: 重新加载应用以应用更改

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Found bugs or want a feature?
ast.target: 发现错误或想要新功能？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Since this feature will modify the vault and is experimental, it's recommended to have a backup of the vault.
ast.target: 由于此功能将修改保险库且仍处于实验阶段，建议您备份保险库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Since this is this is still experimental.
ast.target: 由于此功能仍处于实验阶段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Some things might not work as expected. Report issues
ast.target: 某些功能可能无法按预期工作。报告问题

ast.name: text
ast.source: However, even if things go wrong, it shouldn't affect your files.
ast.target: 但是，即使出现问题，也不会影响您的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can always revert it by disabling caching then reloading Obsidian
ast.target: 您始终可以通过禁用缓存然后重新加载 Obsidian 来恢复。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It might take sometime depending on the size of your vault
ast.target: 根据保险库的大小，可能需要一些时间。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 创建 GitHub 问题！
